subject: Fermi  trigger No 743953682: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:
V. Lipunov, V.Kornilov, E. Gorbovskoy, K. Zhirkov, N.Tyurina, P.Balanutsa, A.Kuznetsov, V.Senik,  D. Vlasenko,
G.Antipov, D.Zimnukhov, E.Minkina, A.Chasovnikov, V.Topolev, D.Kuvshinov, D. Cheryasov, Ya.Kechin, Yu.Tselik, A. Sosnovskij

(Kislovodsk Solar Station of the Pulkovo Observatory),

V. Yurkov, A. Gabovich
(Blagoveschensk Educational State University)

MASTER-Tavrida robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in Russia (Lomonosov MSU, SAI Crimea astronomical station) started inspect of the Fermi GRB240729.57 (trigger No 743953682,19h 23m 02.40s , +44d 43m 12.0s, R=2.24) errorbox  16856 sec after notice time and 16877 sec after trigger time at 2024-07-29 18:29:15 UT, with upper limit up to  18.5 mag. Observations started at twilight.  The observations began at zenith distance = 22 deg. The sun  altitude  is -12.5 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = 13 deg., longitude l = 77 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=2544789

We obtain a following upper limits.
